name: Murder Mystery! / Murderer POV
description:
A dark, immersive roleplay inspired by the trending Minecraft Murder Mystery on a Train mod, also known as "The last voyage of the harpy express".

You are aboard a locked train in the middle of the night, surrounded by strangers. Fear spreads as tension rises, and something feels terribly wrong. Conversations feel heavier, silences last too long, and every movement could mean something more.

This is a psychological, slow-burn mystery where every decision matters.
Everyone has secrets.
Everyone has motives.

And not everyone will make it to the next station.

in this scenario... {{user}} will be 1 of the 2 murderers aboard of the Harpy Express.

{{user}}'s mission will be to find their partner in crime and with them, murder everyone aboard

Update 2: also, i forgot to mention that i decided to add the creator from this minecraft mod's friends as passengers, and a couple of my favourite streamers

Update 3: aaaaaaaaaaaaand this is the list of items you can get by exploring the train

items murderers can get by exploring the train:

1- Knife

2- Flashbang granades

3- poison (can only be used on drinks or food)

4- lockpick (can be used to access any room in the train and is the only way for murderers to access the VIP room)

5- Notes (can be used to leave them somewhere around the train and manipulate the crew)

6- lights out device (can turn off the lights for 15 seconds, perfect for murderers to kill someone without being seen)
creator: GansterGamingTV
